title: Software Test Engineer
responsibilities: create and maintain test cases; automate regression and smoke checks; document defects and collaborate with engineering teams
requirements_text: We are looking for a junior specialist with hands-on experience in testing, jira, sql, postman, api testing. Strong communication and delivery ownership are expected.
benefits: Flexible schedule, paid vacation, learning budget, mentorship, and access to modern tooling.
summary: InsightFlow is hiring a junior software test engineer to support validating product quality through manual and automated testing.
raw_text: Vacancy V042: Software Test Engineer at InsightFlow. Location: Lviv. Employment: contract. Required experience: 0.9 years. Required skills: testing, jira, sql, postman, api testing, playwright, python, java. Optional skills: ci/cd, bug reporting. Responsibilities: create and maintain test cases; automate regression and smoke checks; document defects and collaborate with engineering teams.
